title: Suruli Falls
tagline: Suruli Falls — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Suruli falls, is located 56 km (35 mi) from Theni and 10 km (6.2 mi) from Cumbum in the Theni District in Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Suruli falls, is located 56 km (35 mi) from Theni and 10 km (6.2 mi) from Cumbum in the Theni District in Tamil Nadu, India. It is a 2 stage Cascading water fall. The Suruli River supplying the falls originates from the Meghamalai mountain range. The falls drop from a height of 150 feet (46 m) gathers into a pool, flows for a short distance and again plummets an additional 40 feet (12 m).

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Adi Annamalaiyar Temple, Adi Annamalai
topPlaces.description: Adi Annamalaiyar Temple is a Siva temple in Adi Annamalai in Tiruvannamalai district in Tamil Nadu (India). This temple is in fact older than the “big” (Arunachaleshwar/ Annamalaiyar) temple in Tiruvannamalai.

topPlaces.name: Gudalur, Theni
topPlaces.description: Gudalur is a town in Theni district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. As of 2011, its population was 41,915.

topPlaces.name: Highwavys
topPlaces.description: Highwavys is a Town Panchayat located in the Western Ghats near Chinnamanur, Theni District, Tamil Nadu, India, at an altitude of 1500 meters above sea level. The villages under this Town Panchayat are Meghamalai, Manalaru, Uppermanalaru, Venniaru, Maharajanmettu, Iravangalaru.

topPlaces.name: Kamayagoundanpatti
topPlaces.description: Kamayagowdapatti is a panchayat town in Theni district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Anai patti
topPlaces.description: Anai patti or Nagaiya Goundan patti is a village in the Theni district in the western part of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Cumbum, Tamil Nadu
topPlaces.description: Cumbum, natively enunciated as Kambam (), is a town in the Theni district of the state of Tamil Nadu in India.

topPlaces.name: Cumbum Valley
topPlaces.description: Cumbum Valley, also called Kambam Valley, is a valley in the Theni district of Tamil Nadu state in India near the Kerala state border. This is the most fertile valley in south India, The valley includes lands between Thekkadi Hills, Varusanadu Hills, and Kodaikanal Hills.

topPlaces.name: Shanmuganathi Dam
topPlaces.description: The Shanmuganathi Dam is built across the Shanmugha River near Rayapanpatty, in the Theni district of Tamil Nadu, southern India. It provides water for irrigation for the dry lands such as Pusarikoundan patti, Appipatti, SukkangalPatti, Vellaiammalpuram, Odaipatti and Sepalakottai of the Theni district.

itinerary.title: Day 1 — Adi Annamalaiyar Temple, Adi Annamalai & around

items.note: Adi Annamalaiyar Temple is a Siva temple in Adi Annamalai in Tiruvannamalai district in Tamil Nadu (India). This temple is in fact older than the “big” (Arunachaleshwar/ Annamalaiyar) temple in Tiruvannamalai.
Gudalur is a town in Theni district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. As of 2011, its population was 41,915.

Highwavys is a Town Panchayat located in the Western Ghats near Chinnamanur, Theni District, Tamil Nadu, India, at an altitude of 1500 meters above sea level. The villages under this Town Panchayat are Meghamalai, Manalaru, Uppermanalaru, Venniaru, Maharajanmettu, Iravangalaru.
Kamayagowdapatti is a panchayat town in Theni district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Anai patti or Nagaiya Goundan patti is a village in the Theni district in the western part of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Cumbum, natively enunciated as Kambam (), is a town in the Theni district of the state of Tamil Nadu in India.

Cumbum Valley, also called Kambam Valley, is a valley in the Theni district of Tamil Nadu state in India near the Kerala state border. This is the most fertile valley in south India, The valley includes lands between Thekkadi Hills, Varusanadu Hills, and Kodaikanal Hills.

The Shanmuganathi Dam is built across the Shanmugha River near Rayapanpatty, in the Theni district of Tamil Nadu, southern India. It provides water for irrigation for the dry lands such as Pusarikoundan patti, Appipatti, SukkangalPatti, Vellaiammalpuram, Odaipatti and Sepalakottai of the Theni district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Suruli Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Suruli Falls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Suruli Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (89 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (94 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Suruli Falls?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Suruli Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Suruli Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Suruli Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Suruli Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Adi Annamalaiyar Temple, Adi Annamalai, Gudalur, Theni, Highwavys, Kamayagoundanpatti, Anai patti.
